description_long: This is a small, twin-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a sleek, streamlined fuselage. The aircraft features two propeller engines mounted on the wings, which are straight and extend laterally from the upper section of the fuselage. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a classic T-shape. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with clear windows, suggesting space for a pilot and possibly one or two passengers. The exterior is primarily white with blue accent stripes running along the fuselage and tail.
description: A small, twin-propeller, high-wing airplane with a white and blue color scheme, featuring a conventional tail and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wings, twin propeller engines, and blue accent stripe along the fuselage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, dual propellers, and the nose landing gear beneath the cockpit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the high-wing design, engine placement, and the tail's blue accent.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings with visible propellers.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a T-shape.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with clear windows, likely multi-seat.
